title: manilkara roxburghiana
intro: Manilkara roxburghiana, also known as the Elephant apple, is a tropical tree species that belongs to the Sapotaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Manilkara roxburghiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. In herbal preparations, the fruit pulp and seeds of the tree are used to make decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
